svg.aria-label: Research-based weekly digest cover: Malicious KICS Docker image and VS Code extension supply chain attack against Checkmarx, self-propagating npm worm steals developer tokens, Harvester deploys Linux GoGra backdoor in South Asia via Microsoft Graph API
svg.title: Weekly digest 2026-04-23: KICS Docker malicious image hits Checkmarx, npm self-propagating worm, Harvester GoGra Linux backdoor via MS Graph

g.text: Malicious image + VS Code ext -> Checkmarx
Microsoft Graph API C2 - South Asia target
